description_blurb: This is an FBI 302 interview conducted with a senior US intelligence official regarding his first-hand account of a UAP encounter at a US military facility. USPER relayed to FBI agents that he and other federal and state personnel conducted searches to where orbs had been previously seen.  After searching the area with a helicopter, they found a “super-hot” orb hovering over the ground.  The orb is reported to have travelled for 20 miles at a speed too fast for the helicopter in pursuit.  An additional “swarm” of lights were seen moving in all directions.  A total of four or five additional orbs were seen shortly thereafter for a short time, flaring up and then down.  This pattern of four or five orbs flaring up, then down continued over the next thirty minutes across the area.
title: USPER Statement about UAP Sighting
summary: An FBI 302 interview with a senior US intelligence official detailing a UAP encounter at a US military facility in late 2025. During a helicopter search, a "super-hot" orb was spotted hovering, then traveled 20 miles at high speed, breaking into two objects. It reportedly came within ten feet of the helicopter. Later, a "swarm" of lights and multiple orbs (4-6) were observed by naked eye, NVG, and FLIR, appearing, flaring up and down, and forming various patterns over a 30-minute period.
reported_object_description: A "super-hot" orb; a "large cavern entrance"; a "possible aircraft"; a "swarm of lights (too many to count)"; "two large orbs" described as oval shaped, orange in color with a white or yellow center and emitting light in all directions; "four or five orbs"; "three distinct orbs in a triangle formation"; "five to six orbs".
reported_behavior: Hovering at ground level; heading east then south at a high rate of speed; breaking into two objects; gaining elevation; coming within ten feet of the helicopter; traveling 20 miles; moving too fast for helicopter pursuit; something emerging from two objects and traveling in a different direction at high speed; moving in all directions (swarm); appearing in close proximity to helicopter; flaring up and remaining stationary side by side; flaring up and down in reverse order; appearing in horizontal formation; appearing in triangle formation.
bust_reasoning: The document details multiple UAP sightings over several hours by multiple credible witnesses (senior intelligence officials, pilots) using multiple sensor modalities (naked eye, NVG, FLIR). Key anomalous features include an object described as 'super-hot' on FLIR, hovering at ground level, moving at a high rate of speed (too fast for helicopter pursuit), breaking into two objects, and coming within ten feet of the helicopter. Additionally, multiple orbs were observed in close proximity to the helicopter, exhibiting sequential flaring, forming geometric patterns, and reportedly pursuing military aircraft, all of which are incompatible with known prosaic explanations.
full_text:
# USPER Statement about UAP Sighting - Page 1

SECRET//NOFORN

On [redacted] 2025, at approximately 1700 hours [redacted] [WITNESS 1 (a senior US intelligence official)], [FEDERAL PARTNER 1] and [FEDERAL PARTNER 2], accompanied by [WITNESS 2 (a senior US intelligence official)], and two pilots from [STATE PARTNER ORGANIZATION], departed the [OPERATIONS CENTER] ([COORDINATES]), [redacted] ([FACILITY]) main [redacted] area via a [STATE PARTNER ORGANIZATION] helicopter (call sign [CALL SIGN 1]) to conduct a daytime ariel search of the [MOUNTAIN RANGE NAME] west of [SITE CODE NAME] on [FACILITY]. Previous eyewitness reports from personnel who observed orbs/lights IVO [redacted] ([COORDINATES]) cited hearing thuds as if something has fallen and hit the ground. (Note: Earlier that day the [redacted] Office [redacted] completed a successful test of the [redacted] at [SITE CODE NAME] ([COORDINATES]) on [FACILITY]).

At 1751 hours [redacted] [CALL SIGN 1] spotted a large cavern entrance ([COORDINATES]) and conducted a short orbit of the location [redacted].

At approximately 2050 hours [redacted] [CALL SIGN 1] landed west of the [redacted] mountains and dropped off [WITNESS 2] with [FEDERAL PARTNER 3] personnel. At 2052 hours [redacted] [CALL SIGN 1] headed toward [SITE CODE NAME] to refuel. A second helicopter ([STATE PARTNER ORGANIZATION] - [CALL SIGN 2]) briefly landed at [SITE CODE NAME] to await refueling but then lifted off and returned to the [redacted].

At 2141 hours [redacted] [CALL SIGN 1] lifted off from [SITE CODE NAME] and headed toward debris spotted by the Listening Post/Observation Post (LP/OP - [FEDERAL PARTNER 4] personnel using Forward Looking Infrared (FLIR) and Night Vision Goggles (NVG)- position ([COORDINATES]) located approximately four miles east of [SITE CODE NAME] in the mountains [redacted] location ([COORDINATES])). [CALL SIGN 1] orbited the location while searching with NVGs (pilots) and the naked eye ([WITNESS 1]) with the aid of the helicopter’s spotlight in near full darkness for several minutes with negative results.

At approximately 2149 hours, [CALL SIGN 1] departed the search location to return to base and received notification from LP/OP that [redacted] had [redacted] hits bearing [redacted] 4 miles out from their location. The JOC then provided coord ([COORDINATES]). [CALL SIGN 1] moved to intercept.

At 2202 hours [redacted] [CALL SIGN 1] arrived at the aforementioned coordinates and spotted a possible aircraft on the horizon moving away to the west. LP/OP confirmed the sighting then relayed they spotted an orb under FLIR and described as “super-hot” hovering at ground level before heading bearing [redacted] from LP/OP. LP/OP reported the orb was heading east and then south at a high rate of speed and then broke into two objects. LP/OP directed [CALL SIGN 1] to head south to [COORDINATES] to intercept.

SECRET//NOFORN



# USPER Statement about UAP Sighting - Page 2

SECRET//NOFORN

At 2207 hours [redacted] JOC reported five [MILITARY AIRCRAFT] from [redacted] were in the air space conducting a training mission.

Once on station, [CALL SIGN 1] searched the location with FLIR, NVG, and the naked eye but did not locate the orb. LP/OP reported the orb gained elevation, came within ten feet of [CALL SIGN 1] and then headed east to [redacted]. [CALL SIGN 1] moved to intercept but LP/OP reported the orb continued southeast and estimated it to be past [ROAD NAME], some 20 miles from the current position at [redacted] [CALL SIGN 1], unable to match speed, broke off pursuit, however the co-pilot reported seeing under NVG something emerge from the two objects and then travel in a different direction and a high rate of speed.

At 2218 hours [redacted] [CALL SIGN 1] remained at [COORDINATES] awaiting instructions when the pilots (NVG) and [WITNESS 1] (naked eye) spotting a swarm of lights (too many to count) moving in all directions but generally located west of [redacted] and headed south. JOC relayed they contacted the [MILITARY AIRCRAFT] who were enroute to assist, eta two minutes. At 2227 hours [redacted] [CALL SIGN 1] lost visual of the swarm.

At approximately 2227 hours [redacted] (possible out of order), in proximity of [SITE CODE NAME] headed south, [WITNESS 1] (naked eye) and the pilots (NVG) spotted two large orbs appear in close proximity to [CALL SIGN 1] to the west and above the rotor disk. From the naked eye perspective, the two orbs appeared to flare up and remain stationary side by side. They appeared to be oval shaped, orange in color with a white or yellow center and emitting light in all directions. After a few seconds, a third orb flared up below the two, and then another one below that until there were four or five in total below the original two. After a few seconds the orbs began to flare down in reverse order while appearing to be stationary until visual was lost.

At approximately 2228 hours [redacted] [CALL SIGN 1] - [WITNESS 1] (naked eye) and the pilots (NVG) spotted four or five orbs (similar to the orbs that were in close proximity to the helicopter) appear to the west over the mountains above the [MILITARY AIRCRAFT]. The orbs flared up one at a time in a horizontal formation and after approximately ten – fifteen seconds, flared down in the opposite order.

At approximately 2233 hours [redacted] [CALL SIGN 1] - [WITNESS 1] (naked eye) and the pilots (NVG) spotted a similar orb formation to the east in the direction of [NEARBY TOWN NAME]. The orbs flared up one at a time in a horizontal formation and after approximately ten – fifteen seconds, flared down in the opposite order and lost visual.

At approximately 2241 hours [redacted] [CALL SIGN 1] - [WITNESS 1] (naked eye) and the pilots (NVG) spotted a similar orb flare up west of [SITE CODE NAME] over the mountain. After several seconds the orb flared down and lost visual.

SECRET//NOFORN



# USPER Statement about UAP Sighting - Page 3

SECRET//NOFORN

At 2249 hours [redacted] while positioned IVO [SITE CODE NAME], [CALL SIGN 1] - [WITNESS 1] (naked eye) and the pilots (NVG) spotted a swarm of lights moving in all directions west of [redacted] with three distinct orbs in a triangle formation. After several seconds the orbs flared down and lost visual.

At 2252 hours [redacted] while positioned approximately ten miles north of [SITE CODE NAME], [CALL SIGN 1] - [WITNESS 1] (naked eye) and the pilots (NVG) spotted five to six orbs flare up IVO [LOCAL TOWN] (east of [SITE CODE NAME]). The orbs flared up one at a time in a horizontal formation and after approximately ten seconds, flared down in the opposite order and lost visual.

At 2257 hours [redacted] while positioned approximately ten miles north of [SITE CODE NAME], [CALL SIGN 1] - [WITNESS 1] (naked eye) and the pilots (NVG) spotted four orbs flare up over the [MILITARY AIRCRAFT] as they descended to land at [redacted]. The orbs flared up one at a time in a horizontal formation and after approximately ten seconds, flared down in the opposite order and lost visual.

At approximately 2306 hours [redacted] [CALL SIGN 1] [redacted]. At 2316 hours [redacted] low on fuel, [CALL SIGN 1] returned to the [OPERATIONS CENTER].

At approximately 2320 hours [redacted] [CALL SIGN 1] headed southbound for the [OPERATIONS CENTER] and already in air-to air contact with [FEDERAL PARTER AIRCRAFT], passed each other as [FEDERAL PARTER AIRCRAFT] headed north toward [SITE CODE NAME].

[WITNESS 1] Comments:

[redacted] - Pilots indicated they were recording however many sightings were above the helicopter which was outside of the helicopters FLIR camera angle.

Some things I could not see with the naked eye, but I recall the pilots calling out sightings.

The orbs appeared to break off from [CALL SIGN 1] and pursue the [MILITARY AIRCRAFT].

SECRET//NOFORN
cover_up_reasoning: The document is classified 'SECRET//NOFORN' and features pervasive sentence-level redactions across all pages, obscuring critical details such as witness identities, specific locations, and organizational affiliations. This level of redaction goes beyond routine privacy protection, indicating substantial efforts to conceal the full context and specifics of the UAP incident and the entities involved.
title_zh: 美国人员关于UAP目击事件的声明
summary_zh: 一份联邦调查局302号访谈记录，详细描述了一名美国高级情报官员于2025年末在美国军事设施内遭遇UAP的事件。在一次直升机搜寻过程中，发现一个“超热”球体悬停，随后以高速飞行20英里，并分裂成两个物体。据报告，它曾接近直升机至十英尺以内。随后，目击者通过肉眼、NVG和FLIR观察到“一群”光点和多个球体（4-6个），在30分钟内出现、上下闪烁并形成各种图案。
reported_object_description_zh: 一个“超热”球体；一个“大型洞穴入口”；一个“疑似飞行器”；“一群光点（数量过多无法计数）”；“两个大型球体”，呈椭圆形，橙色，中心为白色或黄色，向四面八方发光；“四到五个球体”；“三个呈三角形编队的独立球体”；“五到六个球体”。
reported_behavior_zh: 在地面高度悬停；先向东后向南高速飞行；分裂成两个物体；升高；接近直升机至十英尺以内；飞行20英里；速度过快，直升机无法追逐；有物体从两个物体中出现并以高速向不同方向飞行；向各个方向移动（群）；出现在直升机附近；闪烁并并排保持静止；按相反顺序上下闪烁；呈水平编队出现；呈三角形编队出现。
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件详细描述了在数小时内由多名可信目击者（高级情报官员、飞行员）使用多种传感器模式（肉眼、NVG、FLIR）观察到的多次UAP目击事件。主要异常特征包括一个在FLIR上显示为“超热”的物体，在地面高度悬停，以高速移动（直升机无法追逐），分裂成两个物体，并接近直升机至十英尺以内。此外，在直升机附近观察到多个球体，表现出顺序闪烁、形成几何图案，并据报告追逐军用飞机，所有这些都与已知的普通解释不符。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件被列为“秘密//NOFORN”级别，并且所有页面都存在普遍的句子级密文处理，模糊了目击者身份、具体地点和组织隶属关系等关键细节。这种程度的密文处理超出了常规隐私保护的范畴，表明为隐藏UAP事件的完整背景、具体细节以及相关实体付出了大量努力。
claims: A "super-hot" orb was observed hovering at ground level.
The orb traveled 20 miles at a speed too fast for helicopter pursuit.
The orb broke into two objects and later came within ten feet of the helicopter.
A "swarm" of lights was seen moving in all directions.
Multiple orbs (4-6) appeared, described as oval, orange with white/yellow centers, flaring up and down in various formations (side-by-side, horizontal, triangle) over a 30-minute period.
claims_zh: 观察到一个“超热”球体在地面高度悬停。
该球体以直升机无法追逐的速度飞行了20英里。
该球体分裂成两个物体，随后接近直升机至十英尺以内。
观察到“一群”光点向各个方向移动。
多个球体（4-6个）出现，被描述为椭圆形，橙色，中心为白色/黄色，在30分钟内以各种编队（并排、水平、三角形）上下闪烁。
witnesses: Two pilots from STATE PARTNER ORGANIZATION
bust_explanations: Advanced unknown drone/UAV: The observed objects exhibit characteristics (extreme speed, close proximity to helicopter, 'super-hot' FLIR signature, breaking into multiple objects, sequential flaring in formations, apparent pursuit of military aircraft) that are far beyond the capabilities of known conventional or consumer drones, suggesting a highly advanced and potentially unknown aerial platform.

Misidentification of military flares or pyrotechnics: While some 'flaring up and down' behavior might superficially resemble flares, the multi-sensor detection (FLIR, NVG, naked eye), close proximity (within ten feet), 'super-hot' signature, high speeds, and complex maneuvers (breaking into two, forming geometric patterns) are inconsistent with standard pyrotechnics.

Atmospheric plasma or ball lightning: The description of 'orbs' and 'flaring' could be loosely associated with atmospheric plasma phenomena. However, the reported 'super-hot' FLIR signature, high-speed directed movement, breaking into multiple objects, and close interaction with a helicopter and military aircraft rule out natural atmospheric phenomena.
bust_explanations_zh: 先进的未知无人机/UAV：观察到的物体表现出的特征（极高速度、与直升机近距离接触、“超热”FLIR信号、分裂成多个物体、编队顺序闪烁、明显追逐军用飞机）远远超出了已知常规或民用无人机的能力，表明可能存在一个高度先进且未知的空中平台。
误将军事照明弹或烟火识别：尽管某些“上下闪烁”的行为可能表面上类似于照明弹，但多传感器探测（FLIR、NVG、肉眼）、近距离接触（十英尺以内）、“超热”信号、高速以及复杂机动（分裂成两个、形成几何图案）与标准烟火不符。
大气等离子体或球状闪电：对“球体”和“闪烁”的描述可能与大气等离子体现象有松散关联。然而，报告的“超热”FLIR信号、高速定向移动、分裂成多个物体以及与直升机和军用飞机的近距离互动排除了自然大气现象。
cover_up_indicators: Extensive sentence-level redactions across all pages, obscuring names, locations, organizations, and specific event details
Key witness names (e.g., WITNESS 1, WITNESS 2) are withheld in the document body
Specific coordinates and facility names related to the incident are redacted
Details of military aircraft and their involvement are redacted
cover_up_indicators_zh: 文件每页均标有“秘密//NOFORN”字样
所有页面均存在广泛的句子级密文处理，模糊了姓名、地点、组织和具体事件细节
文件正文中隐去了主要目击者姓名（例如，目击者1，目击者2）
与事件相关的具体坐标和设施名称被密文处理
军用飞机及其参与的细节被密文处理
